chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Crl. Revision Appln. No. S- 40 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection-A. 2. For hearing of MA No.3700/2021. 561-A. 3. For hearing of main case. 07.03.2022. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Bijarnai, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Additional Prosecutor General ----------- The instant criminal revision application is second in its series. The earlier one was dismissed for non prosecution; its restoration was not sought for by the applicant, for no obvious reason. If for the sake of arguments, it is believed that second criminal revision application on same cause of action is maintainable, then it is hit by laches. Consequently, it is dismissed accordingly. JUDGE
